steps.title: Use the supply contrast
steps.content: The sentence describes a bike-sharing imbalance caused by one-way trips. Some locations end up with too many bicycles while other areas have insufficient supply. The blank needs to describe being overfilled with bicycles.

steps.title: Filter the phrase meanings
steps.content: Choice A means vulnerable to, which does not describe excess supply. Choice B means dependent on, which does not fit the relationship. Choice D means emptied of, which would repeat the shortage idea instead of contrasting with it. The answer is C.
